original: You unwrap the bite-sized snack and quickly toss it into your mouth, spending a minute to enjoy the dense, creamy taste before it slides down your throat."+(["mouse","rodenian","rat"].includes(n.raceShort())?" You can’t help but shiver in delight as the tasty treat hits with a hard shot of pleasure...":"")
You suddenly stumble towards support as vertigo strikes. After a moment of confusion you reorient yourself, albeit at a smaller size than before.

ParseText("\n\nAn uncomfortably strange feeling you cannot describe with words washes over your [pc.legOrLegs], investigating the source you realize your hips have become slightly narrower than before!")

ParseText("\n\nA few seconds after swallowing the wedge, your [pc.ass] goes numb as if you’d sat on it the wrong way too long. Massaging your cheeks to regain feeling, you realize your ass has shrunk!")
"+n.buttRatingLockedMessage()

ParseText("\n\nA chilling sensation runs across your [pc.balls]. "+(n.isCrotchExposed()?"Y":"Undoing your [pc.crotchCovers], y")+"ou watch as your [pc.sack] tightens and shrinks, as the feeling fades you notice your ball"+(n.balls>1?"s have":" have")+" shrunk in size!")
"+n.ballSizeLockedMessage()

ParseText("\n\nA warm sensation washes over your chest as your [pc.breasts] slowly shrink, begging you to give your soft mounds the attention they crave. However, you force your hands to your back and wait for the warmth to die down, leaving you a cup size smaller than before.")
"+n.breastRatingLockedMessage()
"+n.legCountLockedMessage()

You suddenly collapse to the ground in agony, watching as your bestial lower body shifts and writhes, reshaping itself into a more... rodent-like form. By the time the process completes, you’re left with a gigantic version of a mouse’s body."+(n.hasGenitals()?" Fortunately, your genitalia remains more or less where you would expect it, unaltered.":"")

You suddenly collapse to the ground in agony, watching as your [pc.legOrLegs] "+(1!==n.legCount?"rearrange themselves into anthropomorphized, mouse-like shape.":"splits apart and shortens into something akin to a Terran Mouse.")
"+n.legTypeLockedMessage()
Moments after munching down on the bite sized wedge,
your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] "+(n.hasChitin()?"fall":"falls")+" to the ground in heavy clumps, the raw skin across your body sprouting tufts of "+c+" fur that cover you in short order.
your skin crawls as you watch sprouts of hair shoot out, little by little blanketing your entire body in a coat of "+c+" fur!
"+n.skinTypeLockedMessage()

A numb tingling sensation develops at the base of your spine. Looking towards a reflective surface nearby, you notice a pink, ropey tail sprouting out from your behind that barely reaches your ankles. As sensation returns, so it does to your new mouse tail.

ParseText("\n\nWith a sudden twinge of pain followed by nothing, you watch in a nearby reflection as your [pc.tails] merge and shift, shedding excess material as they form into a single ropey, pink mouse tail!")

ParseText("\n\nYou watch with a hint of curiosity as your numbing [pc.tail] shifts in shape and sheds any excess material, slowly warping into a ropey, pink mouse’s tail that reaches down to your "+(n.hasFeet()?"ankles":"[pc.foot]")+".")
"+n.tailCountLockedMessage()
"+n.tailTypeLockedMessage()

With an odd... buzzing sensation, you feel the auricle of your ear growing larger by the second, and when it finally settles down you find a large pair of [pc.skinColor], dish-like mouse ears in their place.

You feel an escalating tingle in your mouth and you know a".concat(o>1?"nother":""," change is coming... but the sensation is mostly concentrated on your gums though. Curious, you approach the nearest mirror to observe the ongoing transformation. Sure enough, you spot")
your fearsome fangs retract as

your two front teeth grow larger, taking up more space and creating quite the overbite. To an unknowing observer, you suppose the new mousey buckteeth makes you look cute. You now have the face of a half-human, half-mouse!

ParseText("\n\nHeat ripples outwards from your [pc.face] as it rearranges itself in a manner that, to an onlooker, would appear utterly unnatural, [pc.skinFurScales] oscillating. After a moment of light-headedness the warmth seems to simply dissipate. Looking into a reflective surface you realize your new face now resembles a Terran mouse’s, complete with whiskers.")

ParseText("\n\nAs you scratch your itchy arms, you realize that they seem to be growing "+d+" fur, your [pc.arms] shifting towards a new form. By the time it’s finished changing you have fuzzy mouse limbs, complete with paws.")

You wait but nothing seems to happen. Maybe it was a dud?"+(n.armType===GLOBAL.TYPE_MOUSE&&n.legType===GLOBAL.TYPE_MOUSE&&n.tailType===GLOBAL.TYPE_MOUSE&&n.tailCount>0&&n.hasFur()&&n.earType===GLOBAL.TYPE_MOUSE&&n.faceType===GLOBAL.TYPE_MOUSE?" Or maybe you just can’t become more mouse-like...":"")
e.capitalA+e.short+" eats the cheese to no effect.
